_description: TOEFL listening Q1-8 'Choose the best response' for the 8 tiered entrance papers. Extracted from real exam PDFs under /Users/zhouxin/Desktop/新托福资料/<date>新托福真题/. Answers cross-verified against <date>答案.pdf.
_source_note: Q1-8 of each TOEFL listening test is a standalone 'Choose the best response' block. No question stem is displayed; only A-D options. Audio prompt plays once per question.
